api_key.description: Chargify API key. Sent as the HTTP Basic username with the literal password "x" (Chargify's documented API-key auth convention). Used only when username/password are not both supplied.

username.description: Explicit HTTP Basic username; overrides api_key when set together with the password secret.

password.description: Explicit HTTP Basic password; overrides the api_key/"x" default when set together with username.

domain.description: Chargify domain (e.g. yoursubdomain.chargify.com). Used to derive base_url when base_url is not set.

subdomain.description: Chargify subdomain; combined with ".chargify.com" to derive base_url when both domain and base_url are unset.

base_url.description: Chargify API base URL, e.g. https://yoursubdomain.chargify.com. Required: legacy derives this from domain/subdomain, but that cross-key derivation has no engine mechanism today (see docs.md Known limits), so this bundle requires the fully-formed URL instead.
